pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_nx_witness.sh line 199 defines CAMERA_NAMES array with 'Parking Lot Camera' as the first entry; lines 204-226 assign these names to discovered virtual test cameras via REST API PATCH /rest/v1/devices/. Consistently referenced in setup_task.sh line 42, export_result.sh line 22, and verifier.py logic.

Code analysis: consistently used in setup_task.sh (line 29), export_result.sh (line 74), and verifier.py (line 58) as the event source parameter for Generic Event rules. This is the 'source' parameter of the official Nx Witness /api/createEvent endpoint (documented in Network Optix support article).

Code analysis: consistently used in setup_task.sh (lines 29, 54), export_result.sh (line 75), and verifier.py (line 58) as the event caption parameter. This is the 'caption' parameter of the official Nx Witness /api/createEvent endpoint (documented in Network Optix support article).

Base URL https://localhost:7001 defined in task_utils.sh line 4 (NX_BASE variable). Endpoint /api/createEvent is documented in official Nx Witness API documentation (Network Optix support articles on HTTP Generic Event API). The /api/createEvent endpoint is the official method for third-party systems to send Generic Events to Nx Witness for use in the Rules Engine.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Nx Witness VMS task environment. The task configures an automated Generic Event rule in Nx Witness to create a bookmark when an external AI analytics system detects loitering. The rule listens for events with source 'AI_Analytics' and caption 'Loitering_Detected', creating a bookmark on the 'Parking Lot Camera' (the first virtual test camera renamed by setup_nx_witness.sh). Event simulation uses the official Nx Witness API endpoint https://localhost:7001/api/createEvent with source and caption parameters. All camera names, event sources, captions, and API endpoints are correctly specified and consistently used across task setup, verification, and API interaction scripts.
